items.h: AEW's Jeff Jarrett Talks TKO-Netflix Deal, Sheamus Departing WWE
items.p: AEW star and TNA co-founder Jeff Jarrett spoke about TKO Group Holding's current deal with Netflix, as well as the recent departure of Sheamus from the company.

items.p: Wrestling veteran Tommy Dreamer believes MJF should remain within title contention, arguing he should be featured in the main event at All In: London in August.

items.p: With Mick Foley now appearing on AEW programming, Tommy Dreamer believes he could draw a lot of money working against one figure in particular.
